name: VTIL_ResetResponseContent
title: VTIL_ResetResponseContent
syntax: long VTIL_ResetResponseContent(dbNode workingSetMaster, byte vtFunction); // form 1
long VTIL_ResetResponseContent(dword addressWorkingSetMaster, byte vtFunction); // form 2
long VTIL_ResetResponseContent(dbNode vt, dbNode workingSetMaster, byte vtFunction); // form 3
long VTIL_ResetResponseContent(dbNode vt, dword addressWorkingSetMaster, byte vtFunction); // form 4
description: The function resets the response modification of VTIL_SetResponseContent. Afterwards the default response is sent by the VT IL.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function

parameters.name: workingSetMaster
parameters.description: Receiver of the VT12 response message

parameters.name: addressWorkingSetMaster
parameters.description: Address of the Receiver of the VT12 response message

parameters.name: vtFunction
parameters.description: The function refers to the response with this VT function value

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
